dailyNews.title: Hegseth says US blockade to continue, ready for new attacks on Iran energy
dailyNews.description: US urges resolution through talks, but says Washington 'locked and loaded' to resume attacks.

dailyNews.title: US-Iran War To Resume? Trump's War Secy Warns Tehran Of 'Strikes' If Peace Deal Rejected
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth warns Iran of "devastating" strikes on energy and infrastructure if peace talks fail, stating the US is "locked and loaded" as nuclear negotiations stall.

dailyNews.title: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500, Nasdaq Hit Fresh Records As Wall Street Rebounds From War
dailyNews.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average also climbed by more than 130 points in early trade.

dailyNews.title: IEA Chief's Big Warning Amid US-Iran War: Europe Has Maybe Six Weeks Of Jet Fuel
dailyNews.description: Fatih Birol says flight disruptions could begin soon if Middle East oil flows are not restored, as Europe's fuel reserves come under mounting pressure.

dailyNews.title: Struggling Shoe Company Pivots Overnight To AI Company, Stock Price Spikes 600%
dailyNews.description: A struggling American footwear brand has bizarrely pivoted to AI data centres, with its shares skyrockting 600% in a day.

dailyNews.title: US defence secretary Pete Hegseth attacks press coverage of war on Iran
dailyNews.description: US defence secretary Hegseth criticised media coverage of the war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo decries world ruled by ‘tyrants’ after Trump attacks
dailyNews.description: Pope, in Cameroon, calls for 'decisive change of course' that leads away from conflict and the exploitation of the land.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Donald Trump: 'Show me someone without an ego, and I'll show you a ….'
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump's quote emphasises that ego is a crucial element for success, framing it as a driving force behind ambition and competitiveness. It suggests that lacking ego may indicate a lack of confidence, while also warning against unchecked ego that can lead to arrogance and poor decision-making.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon escalates Iran standoff, warns: ‘This blockade applies to all ships, regardless of nationality’
dailyNews.description: US officials said Iran’s motivation to maintain a ceasefire remains high, even as Washington signals readiness for prolonged military enforcement if negotiations collapse.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court opens last-minute door for Bengal voters cleared in appeals
dailyNews.description: The order marks a calibrated shift from the court’s earlier stance that those whose appeals remained pending could not be permitted to vote

dailyNews.title: Pope criticises 'tyrants' who spend billions on wars, days after Trump spat
dailyNews.description: The comments follow a high-profile spat with US President Donald Trump, who called the Pope weak on crime.

dailyNews.title: Why the Iran war did not go according to US plans
dailyNews.description: Washington misread Iran, overestimated its own leverage and found itself trapped in a costly 40-day war of attrition.

dailyNews.title: GOP firebrand vows to strip Swalwell and Gonzales of lifetime taxpayer-funded benefits
dailyNews.description: Rep. Boebert announces effort to cancel pensions for Swalwell and Gonzales after both resigned from Congress amid sexual assault allegations.

dailyNews.title: DAVID MARCUS: Why Democrats' harebrained popular vote scheme
dailyNews.description: Democrats push to replace the electoral college with a national popular vote compact as Virginia becomes the 18th state to sign on to the agreement.

dailyNews.title: Victoria Beckham breaks silence on family feud with son Brooklyn and his wife Nicola Peltz
dailyNews.description: Victoria Beckham breaks her silence on the family feud with son Brooklyn and daughter-in-law Nicola Peltz, in a Wall Street Journal interview.

dailyNews.title: Fast-food chain rejects tech trends, doubles down on in-person service
dailyNews.description: The Fox News Lifestyle Newsletter brings you trending stories on family, travel, food, neighbors helping neighbors, pets, autos, military veterans, heroes, faith and American values.

dailyNews.title: Tyler Robinson judge unseals ATF report in assassination of Charlie Kirk
dailyNews.description: An unsealed ATF ballistics report in the Charlie Kirk assassination case confirms a casing match but is inconclusive on a bullet fragment link to the gun.

dailyNews.title: Lead contamination crisis exposed in public parks across major southern city
dailyNews.description: An investigation found lead contamination at 50% of New Orleans playgrounds tested, sparking outrage and a push for $5 million in federal cleanup funds.

topStories.description: Four Democratic-led states reject Trump's no taxes on tips and overtime, drawing Republican criticism for denying relief to hard-working Americans.

topStories.description: Constitutional scholar and Clarence Thomas clerk John Eastman faces disbarment by the California Supreme Court over his 2020 election work for Trump.

topStories.description: China used a visit by the Vietnamese leader to show a deepening of security ties that analysts say far outpaces U.S. defense ties in the region.

topStories.title: Trump’s ‘Triumphal Arch’ Draws Backlash, Even From an Expert Who Proposed It
topStories.description: The story of how President Trump quadrupled the size of the original proposal for the arch follows a now-familiar pattern.

topStories.title: House set to break with Trump, vote against ending deportation protections for Haitians
topStories.description: All House Democrats and four Republicans forced a vote on a measure to stop the Trump administration from ending temporary deportation protections for more than 300,000 people from Haiti.

dailyNews.title: Mamdani says he and Trump "are in touch," have "one place of agreement"
dailyNews.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani said he and President Trump are "honest, direct about the fact that we have many disagreements," but they agree on their love for New York City.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin set to launch tariff refund portal. Here's what to know.
dailyNews.description: A federal agency will open a portal on April 20 that lets businesses apply for a refund for Trump tariffs struck down by the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: Diplomacy to end Iran war ramps up as Trump touts Israel-Lebanon talks
dailyNews.description: With the Iran war frozen by a ceasefire but oil still not moving through the Strait of Hormuz, there are burgeoning efforts to build a diplomatic off-ramp.

dailyNews.title: Trump, administration officials differ on when gas prices may fall as Iran war continues
dailyNews.description: President Trump continues to say the Iran war is "very close to over," but no new peace talks have been confirmed. Meanwhile, gas prices remain elevated, and while Mr. Trump says they'll plummet "very soon," Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent has a different timeline. Weijia Jiang reports.

dailyNews.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent is preparing banks to collect citizenship data
dailyNews.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says the Trump administration expects banks to comply in collecting citizenship information from customers.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Iran 'digging out' bombed weapons facilities, Hegseth says
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: Drugmakers raised prices on hundreds of drugs despite Trump deals, report finds
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said his deals with drugmakers would bring down prescription drug prices in the U.S.

dailyNews.title: White House and DOJ separation changes under Trump
dailyNews.description: NBC News' Laura Jarrett stops by "Here's the Scoop" to discuss her interview with acting Attorney General Todd Blanche and how he sees the future of the Justice Department.
